message:
style(mvcc,vdbe,core,harness): fmt cleanup, fix imports and test params

- Remove unused BTreeMap and Span imports in ssi_validation/codegen
- Format check_read/write_overlap impls consistently
- Add missing ActiveTxnView methods to bench mock
- Fix nitrosketch expected_bytes (f32 = 4 bytes, not 8)
- Reduce concurrent transfer test ops for speed (100 → 20)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
